title: Carex rodnensis
taxonomy: Carex rodnensis is classified as a species within the genus Carex, which is a group of grass-like plants commonly known as sedges. It belongs to the family Cyperaceae, which is a large and diverse group of plants that includes many species of sedges and rushes. The exact classification of Carex rodnensis is Carex rodnensis (Litov.) Nyman, which includes the genus name Carex, the species name rodnensis, and the authority, Litov. and Nyman. This classification suggests that Carex rodnensis is a distinct species that can be identified by its unique characteristics. The classification of Carex rodnensis reflects its evolutionary history and its relationship to other species within the genus Carex.
